In this lesson, I want to show you two different resources that you can use to build your lead magnet offer pages. Now there's lots of different applications out there that you can use to build pages. I happen to like both of these applications and so I very quickly want to show you how easy they are to create this type of lead magnet offer page. The first tool that I want to show you is called lead pages. And after you sign up for lead pages, you get access to a bunch of really nice, really sharp looking templates. You can see that they've got their templates for pages actually broken down into different category sales pages, webinar pages, launch pages, etc. And they've got this section over here labeled opt-in pages. And so if we click on opt-in pages, you'll see that now what we're looking at are all of the different opt-in pages that you can build using lead pages. Scroll down and you'll see that there are a lot of really nice pages in here. But this is the page that I showed you in the prior lesson that is just crushing it for us. I highly recommend that this is the page that you start with, that this becomes the initial control that you will use and test everything else against this one. And so let me show you how easy it is to build this page. So we're going to click on use this template. I'm just going to skip this step right here. And now what happens is you're brought to this little builder over here where you're able to customize everything and anything on the page. First thing you do is you would enter a page name over here so we could call this whatever we want. And then what we can do is we would then go and we would change first the prehead. And so to do that, all we do is just click on this and you could see now we have the ability to put in whatever we want over there. Click OK. Over here, we just click on this and then we have the ability to put in whatever we want there. And I'm going to come back to the email field in just a second, but then we can change this, the call to action button if we want the copy on there by going here and changing it to whatever we want. We could change this copy. Same way, all of these are just point and click. Now when you are integrating this page with your autoresponder, and in this case with the six-figure funnel formula, you're learning and going to learn how to use a Webber, one of the easiest email autoresponder platforms to use, it integrates right in here. And the way this works is you've got right over here where it says opt-in form integration. You would click on this and on this dropdown, what you would see is you would see all of your A Webber lists. So all the lists that you're going to learn about later on in the six-figure funnel formula, the eight different lists would be listed here. You would choose list zero, click OK, and then this entire form would be integrated automatically with A Webber with what it is that you're going to learn later on. There are a couple of different options to publish this page. I'll show you, click Save. We have the option of just having this page hosted right on lead pages, and so we can actually just use this link if we wanted to and send people direct to this link, and the page is hosted, the form is working and whatnot. They also give you an option with a free plugin to integrate it with your site if your site's on WordPress and it works seamlessly. And so that is how you create the lead magnet offer page in lead pages. Now I want to show you a different application. This next application is called 10-minute pages. 10-minute pages is also very similar to lead pages in that it is point and click and customize. The big difference between 10-minute pages and lead pages is that with 10-minute pages you have even more customization options because it uses a drag and drop editor. So you're able to not only customize the templates that come with 10-minute pages in terms of the content, but you can also customize the look and feel, removing elements, adding elements, and so on. And so let me show you how easy this is to customize the page. So when you get started with 10-minute pages and you log in, and I'm not going to show you the basics of getting started with 10-minute pages, I just want to show you how quick and easy it is to build the lead magnet offer page. You have the ability to build a variety of different pages over here. The first one in the upper left is email squeeze pages. If you click on that, you can see that as I mentioned, 10-minute pages also comes with a variety of different pages that you can use for your lead magnet offer. The one that we're going to go with is this one right over here. What we do is we give it a name. So let's just put in test. Let's change this to test. And then we're going to click start editing. Now what you'll see is you have the ability, just like with lead pages, to customize everything and anything. So let's see this element right here. You can just click on it and then click delete, and now it's gone. We can click on this, and we have the ability to now customize the headline in here. We can make this headline whatever it is that we want. You can make the pre-head whatever it is that we want. Same thing. You can get rid of any copy that you want on this page. So you can get rid of this. And then you're able to also right over here integrate with a Weber. And so this is also extremely simple to use. It's never been easier today to create a high converting lead magnet offer page. Never been easier than it is right now. And lead pages and 10 minute pages are two fantastic resources. I will also tell you that Kyle Graham, the creator of 10 minute pages was gracious and generous enough to offer a special discount just for six figure funnel formula customers. And so you can find more information about grabbing that customer only discount in the resource directory area of the platform. And so that is how you create your lead magnet offer page.
